primary_source: cosmic in nature, arriving in violent meteor showers
terrestrial_origin: massive deposits pulsate deep within the earth
nomadic_collection: polished 'river rocks' and fine dust carried down from mountain peaks

high_tech_application.name: Chaos-Boiler
